web.title: Username Generator
web.description: With this tool, you can enter your own word, and then pick from the list of categories to generate usernames made up of your typed word and random words.
web.markdown:
[Skip navigation](https://jimpix.co.uk/words/username-generator.php#content)

Generate UsernamesGo!

Go!

## Some Notes

The regular [random username generator](https://jimpix.co.uk/words/random-username-generator.php) lets you generate lists of usernames made up of words picked from lists of categories.

However, most of the time people want a username which is personal, and that means something to them.

With this tool, you can enter your own word, and then pick from the list of categories to generate usernames made up of your typed word and random words from the username category you select - or just select any word at random if you leave the category set to 'Random Category'.

Once you've submitted the form, you can then choose from a load of additional options, such as choosing the starting letter, username length, the position of your word, and so on.

### Bells and whistles

If you click on the `Show Bells and Whistles` option, there are a load of useful options, such as:

- Leetify
  - Swaps letters in your username for numbers
- Nice Font
  - Display with a nice font on a pretty background colour
- Plural 1st / 2nd Word
  - Stick an \`s\` on the end of the first or second component word
- Reverse
  - Reverse the words in the results so that cartnose becomes traceson
- Shuffle
  - Randomly rearrange the letters in the username
- Chunk
  - Return a random chunk of a word
- Number at Start / End
  - Add a random number at the start / end of your username
- Initial Capitals
  - Capitalise initial letter of each word
- Filter Text
  - Include text you want your username results to include, and once you type in something, select if that should appear anywhere in the word, or at the start or end...

### Variations:

- [Random Username Generator](https://jimpix.co.uk/words/random-username-generator.php)
- [200 Random Usernames](https://jimpix.co.uk/words/random-username-list.php)
- [One Word Usernames](https://jimpix.co.uk/words/one-word-usernames.php)

## Like our Username Generator? You’ll love our app.

[Try free for 14 days](https://www.dashlane.com/download)

## What makes a strong username?

#### Choose username length (up to 40 characters) and complexity

#### Include/exclude random characters and keywords

![Illustration representing how Dashlane’s Secure Password Generator and User Generator helps people avoid common password mistakes.](https://www.dashlane.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fripleyprd.wpenginepowered.com%2Fwp-content%2Fuploads%2F2025%2F07%2Fdashlane_password_username_generator_secure.webp&w=3840&q=75)

# Is creating unique usernames enough to stay secure online?

It’s a smart first step—but it’s just one piece of the security puzzle. To protect your accounts, you also need strong, unique passwords, two-factor authentication, and breach monitoring tools.. That’s where Dashlane comes in.

[Buy now](https://www.dashlane.com/getpremium) [Try for free](https://www.dashlane.com/download)

![A woman on her laptop uses Dashlane to generate a secure username.](https://www.dashlane.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fripleyprd.wpenginepowered.com%2Fwp-content%2Fuploads%2F2025%2F07%2Fdashlane_username_generator.webp&w=3840&q=75)

### Username Generator FAQs

#### How do username generators work?

Username generators use algorithms to create random usernames based on a combination of characters, numbers, and symbols to generate strong and secure usernames. They ensure that usernames are difficult to guess and enhance online security.

#### What is Dashlane’s Username Generator?

It’s a free tool that creates strong, random usernames instantly.

#### Do I need to pay to use the Username Generator?

Nope, it’s free! But if you want to save usernames and passwords, autofill them, sync across devices, and get added protection, Dashlane Premium is the way to go.

#### How do I generate a strong username with Dashlane?

Generating a strong username with Dashlane's Username Generator is easy. Simply customize the settings according to your preferences, such as username length, random characters, and a keyword at the end. As you modify your requirements, Dashlane automatically generates a strong username that meets your criteria. Random usernames are easy with Dashlane!

#### Is Dashlane’s Username Generator safe to use?

Yes, it is safe to use due to how truly random the generated usernames are. The most important thing about a username generator is the flexibility and customization to create random usernames. Dashlane allows different options for the user, such as the ability to change the length, and include random characters.

#### Why do unique usernames matter?

Reusing the same username across multiple accounts makes it easier for hackers to connect the dots between your identities online—especially if your usernames are tied to your email address or real name. Using a unique username for every account helps protect your privacy, limit your exposure in a data breach, and make it harder for attackers to launch targeted phishing or credential-stuffing attacks. Just like with passwords, uniqueness matters.

#### What are the most common username mistakes—and how can I avoid them?

The most common username pitfalls are reusing the same username everywhere, including personal information (like your name or birth year), and picking something too easy to guess. To avoid these, skip anything predictable or publicly tied to you. Instead, use a random, generated username—or combine words and characters in unexpected ways. Bonus: Dashlane’s Username Generator can do all the hard work for you, instantly.

#### What’s the benefit of saving usernames in Dashlane?

You’ll never have to write them down, reuse them, or risk forgetting them. Dashlane Premium keeps your usernames and passwords encrypted, autofilled, and instantly accessible wherever you are. Try it for free for 14 days. (No credit card required.)

![](https://ripleyprd.wpenginepowered.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/dashlane_cta_module_background_lightmode-scaled.webp)

web.description: Try our instant username generator to create unique and secure usernames, gamer tags or handles for your social media accounts.
web.markdown:
We value your privacy

This website uses cookies to personalize your experience and may share data with partners for advertising and analytics. You can adjust preferences or opt out in Privacy Controls. Learn more in our [Cookie Policy](https://my.nordaccount.com/legal/cookie-policy/).


OK, understoodPrivacy controls

[Skip to main content](https://nordpass.com/username-generator/#content)

# Username Generator

Create unique, secure, and fun usernames, gamer tags, or handles for your social media accounts.

[Get NordPass](https://nordpass.com/try-premium/)[No, just generate usernames](https://nordpass.com/username-generator#Generator)

![NordPass username generator tool](https://sb.nordcdn.com/transform/3aef0732-bb9d-479b-81f6-252cec7f532c/username-generator-mobile?format=webp&quality=80&io=transform%3Afill%2Cwidth%3A1920)![NordPass username generator tool](https://sb.nordcdn.com/transform/4e9f1ff6-6953-4521-a9d6-9b15033094ac/username-generator?format=webp&quality=80&io=transform%3Afill%2Cwidth%3A1920)

## Generate random usernames

Try our instant username generator to create unique and secure usernames, gamer tags or handles for your social media accounts.

You can add your own word or by clicking on the refresh icon (  ) you will get a word suggestion

Generate

Username length

20

Category: AllCategory: MoviesCategory: MusicCategory: AnimalsCategory: SpaceCategory: FoodCategory: NatureCategory: Sports

Advanced options

seablackwidowcycling

Copy

sealemonowlavalanche

Copy

seastandbymebateagle

Copy

seatomatoesviolaleaf

Copy

seawafflesfrogthekid

Copy

## Why use username generator

![hacker](https://sb.nordcdn.com/transform/27c0e118-76f6-49ff-b212-ed920c8f932a/hacker?format=webp&quality=80&io=transform%3Afill%2Cwidth%3A1920)

## Why use username generator

Your username is your personal data, and a poorly chosen one can link back to you or even reveal your identity. How?

Hackers can use the same tools marketers do and cross-reference your usernames over multiple platforms. **That can help them create your online profile and lead to your social media accounts.**

However, you can protect yourself. The trick is **to use a random username generator and never reuse the same name on multiple accounts.**

## Frequently asked questions

How do I use the NordPass Username Generator?

Using the NordPass Username Generator is easy. First, use the length slider to adjust the character count for your username. Then, you have three other options:

- Click the Generate button to see a selection of random usernames generated by NordPass.

- Open Advanced options and check the Random characters box to see a selection of usernames generated using only random characters.

- If you prefer a distinct online identity, enter a keyword of your choice or use the one generated by NordPass. Click Generate for a selection of usernames that include your keyword.


Once done, you can also click on the social media icons next to the chosen username to check if it's available on YouTube, Reddit, Pinterest, or Vimeo. Click Copy to add your desired username to the clipboard. That's it — you're all done!

What is a secure username?

Your username is your identification, which you can use to build an entire profile. It’s common to have similar usernames across multiple platforms, as this creates a personal brand in a sense. But this can also produce unwanted outcomes, since bad actors could uncover your identity or even start impersonating you online. A secure username shouldn’t link you to your other online or social media accounts. It also shouldn’t contain any personally identifiable information, such as your first and last name, date of birth, or anything else that could be traced back to your real-life identity.

How often should I change my username?

Unlike your password, you don’t need to change the username of any given account regularly. In fact, most platforms won’t even let you without contacting customer support. However, for maximum security, always use different usernames for each new online account you create.

How do I “leetify” my username?

To leetify a text means to replace standard letters with special symbols or numbers. Leetified usernames are not only harder to link to other accounts, but they also allow you to pick similar-looking usernames if the desired one is taken.

You can easily leetify usernames with the NordPass Username Generator. Select Leetify characters in Advanced options. If you’d rather do it yourself, all you have to do is replace letters with similar symbols: for example, use “@” or “0” for “o,” “1” for “i,” “5” for “S,” and so on.

How do I create a unique username?

There are a few tricks you can use to create a truly unique username. Choose a word or a phrase you like and then translate it to a different language and use that as your username. You can also incorporate puns in your usernames to give them that special flair. Another fun trick is to choose a random word and spell it backwards.

How to create a good gamertag

For a good gamertag, start off by considering the characters from your favorite games, or associate your own name with the game you love. You can also try and make an anagram of your favorite game title. Remember — there are no rules when it comes to creating your gamer tag. Do it whichever way you like until you’ve got something you love.

What is a unique username?

A unique username is one that stands out among the others. In most cases, such usernames include numbers, uppercase and lowercase letters, and special characters. In quite a few cases, unique usernames are at least 10 characters long. If you’re looking to create a unique username, try to include these details and see what happens.

How can NordPass enhance my security?

To protect your company and its business data effectively, you should store both your username and password in a highly secure [password manager for business](https://nordpass.com/business-password-manager/) – such as NordPass, for example.

Speaking of usernames, bear in mind that NordPass includes an advanced username generator that can help you create unique, fun, and secure usernames for you and your team members. With its help, you will be able to make it much harder for cybercriminals to identify and steal your login credentials.

web.title: Free Username Generator for Social Media | Handle Ideas Tool
web.description: Get a list of usernames for social media, gaming sites, forums, and more with this free username generator from Hootsuite.
web.markdown:
[Skip to content](https://www.hootsuite.com/social-media-tools/username-generator#start-of-content)

# Need a new handle fast? Try our free username generator

Not sure what to call yourself online? Hootsuite’s instant username generator will give you username ideas that perfectly suit your internet persona (or the one you’re scheming up).

Network

Select NetworkInstagramTwitterTikTokPinterestBeRealMastodonSnapchatYouTubeRobloxTumblrFortniteMinecraftValorantXboxPlaystationTwitchRedditSteamDiscordGitHubMediumStrava

Account type

Select Account typeBusinessPersonal

Category

Select CategoryEducationNonprofitBankingRetailInterior designReal estateArchitectureWellnessTechHealthCoachingHotelInsuranceClothingPreschoolJewelryHair salonNail salonGroceryFurnitureHome goodsCeramicsPet groomingClinicBookstoreLightingFabric storeBeautyFitnessFoodieLifestyleGamingDaily vlogFamily vlogTravel vlogComedyPetArtistMusicianReviewsFinanceChefFashion

Short description0/200

Generate username

**_Please note:_** _This tool may display inaccurate or offensive material that doesn’t represent Hootsuite’s views. You’re solely responsible for use of any content generated using this tool, including its compliance with applicable laws and third-party rights._

## **What is a username generator?**

A username generator is a tool that instantly provides a list of social media usernames based on the information you provide. Ours uses artificial intelligence (AI) and a little help from you to create tons of clever and fun usernames in a matter of seconds.

Get a list of handles for every platform — [Instagram](https://blog.hootsuite.com/instagram-username-ideas/), [TikTok](https://blog.hootsuite.com/tiktok-username-ideas/), [YouTube](https://blog.hootsuite.com/change-youtube-channel-name/), Pinterest, Roblox, you name it. When you provide the generator with a few words that describe you and your interests, it’ll throw out options that encapsulate your personality.

## **What can I use this username generator for?**

This AI username generator is designed to take the guesswork out of coming up with usernames across the internet. From online forums to gaming platforms, it’ll save you hours of brain-racking when signing up for new sites or reinventing your online identity.

### Social media platforms

The best thing about our username generator is that it can help you come up with social media handle ideas in literal seconds. Pick a new handle for Instagram, Twitter, TikTok, Tumblr, YouTube, BeReal, Snapchat, Mastodon, Twitch, or any other website that requires you to register with a handle.

### Forums

We find our random username generator super-handy for online forums like Reddit, Discord, Steam, GitHub, and Medium. Get a quick name for your throwaway account to post completely anonymously or pick a main handle based on your true personality and interests.

### Gaming websites

This tool also works as a gaming username generator for Roblox, Fortnite, Minecraft, Valorant, Xbox, Playstation, and more. Give it some ideas based on your gaming style, your favorite game, or an inside joke to make your fellow gamers laugh.

## **How to use this username generator**

Whether you’re looking for funny, unique, serious, or cute username ideas, this tool will help you choose one with virtually no effort. Here’s how to use it in a few quick steps.

### Step 1: Brainstorm who you want to be

Think about how you’d like to be known online. Do you want to be seen as funny, authoritative, knowledgeable, or goofy? Then come up with some words, phrases, or themes that embody that.

### Step 2: Select your account type and category

The username generator is smart, but it still needs a bit of info from you for the best results. It will ask if you run a business account or if you’re a content creator as well as which category best describes your account.

### Step 3: Add a short description

Simply add words that describe you or your business and poof! The AI will do all the creative work for you. Then you can head over to your platform of choice and register from scratch or change your username.

### Step 4: Claim your username

Lastly, make sure your username is available on the platform you’re using and double check that it fits its requirements and terms of use. Then head over to the social network and initiate your change!

## **How to create a unique username: 5 tips**

Choosing a username is a _big deal._ Just imagine: you go viral on TikTok, make lifelong friends on a forum, or rise to the top of the leaderboard on an up-and-coming gaming platform. The name you go by online could stick with you for years, so you want to make sure you choose wisely. These tips will help you nail it.

### Decide if you want to stay anon

One of the first questions you want to ask yourself when choosing a new username is “how anonymous do I want to be?” Including any identifiable information at all, no matter how seemingly unimportant, could tip people off to your real identity. (Don’t believe us? Check out the [TikToker who consensually doxxes people](https://www.nbcnews.com/pop-culture/tiktoker-consensually-doxxing-people-teach-social-media-privacy-rcna55037) to show how easy it is to find peoples’ private information online).

### Zero in on a few key parts of your personality

Start by identifying some of your key personality traits and your niche online. Completely stumped? Think about your favorite sport, food, celebrity, or place. How do friends describe you? What are your favorite creators’ handles? Then come up with a few words that represent that sentiment and you as a person — your hobbies, interests, and personality traits.

### Take inspo from your favorite creators

In order to prevent confusion, you want to make sure your handle is completely unique to you. Still, it helps to look at the usernames of some of your favorite online personalities to get some ideas of what you like and what grabs your attention. If you’re a member of a certain online community or follow specific niches, consider going with a handle that fits right into those worlds.

### Keep it simple and easy to remember

It’s hard enough to remember your password, so try to make your username as simple and straightforward as possible. You can still differentiate with your favorite number or an underscore, but avoid using any unnecessary symbols, letters, or numbers. Keep it short and sweet so that you and your followers never forget it.

### If you run a business, stick to your brand name

This one’s pretty obvious, but make sure not to divert too much from your brand name if you’re running a business account. In cases where that isn’t possible, add numbers in place of letters or use underscores between words. The same logic applies to content creators looking to grow. The name you pick now will be closely associated with you into the future, so make sure it’s closely aligned with your personal brand.

## **What is a good username?**

Everyone has their own definition of a “good” username, but in general we think a solid handle is one that’s unique, representative of your personality, and easy to remember. Complicated symbols, misspellings, or anything that could be considered offensive should, of course, be off the table. For businesses, the best usernames are your exact brand name (or as close to it as possible).

[Start your free trial](https://www.hootsuite.com/plans)

## A dozen social media tools. One tab.

web.markdown:
# Free Username Generator for Instagram, TikTok & More

Looking for the perfect Instagram username, IG handle, or random name ideas? Our free username generator helps you create unique, catchy usernames for Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, Discord, and more—all in seconds. Whether you need a random username generator to spark inspiration or a targeted Instagram username generator for your brand, Vaizle's AI-powered tool delivers creative, on-brand name ideas instantly. No signup required, just enter your niche and tone to get started.

## What is a What is an AI Username Generator?

An AI username generator is your go-to tool for getting creative and memorable username ideas within seconds. Whether you need an Instagram username generator for your IG handle or a random username generator for unexpected ideas, this tool delivers creative options instantly. Simply enter the primary keyword (which can also be your brand name or niche), profile category, and tone. Vaizle's free AI username generator tool will then display a bunch of username ideas for you to go over.

## How to Select the Best Random Username Generator Results?

Confused between multiple names discovered with the aesthetic and cute usernames generator tool? Here's how to find the best one for your Instagram, TikTok, Twitter, or other social media profiles.

### Find the username that best fits brand personality

Go over the names generated by the random username generator and shortlist ones that reflect your actual mission on the platform.

### Select a username that’s easy to type correctly

You don’t want a username that’s easy to misspell. Pick the option that is least likely to cause confusion and is also easy to memorize.

### Check its availability across social media platforms

Check if the selected username is taken or not on the given platform. If so, click on the ‘Reset’ button to get more username ideas.

## Why Use the Username Generator for Instagram, IG & Random Names?

![](https://vaizle.com/assets/vcox-tw3/username-generator/why-use-icon1.png)

### Get Username Inspiration Instantly

Enter a keyword and category that best describes your brand and instantly get creative usernames with the aesthetic username generator.

![](https://vaizle.com/assets/vcox-tw3/username-generator/why-use-icon2.png)

### Perfect for All Social Platforms

Instead of going over various username creators, Vaizle’s random username generator works for most online platforms – Pinterest, Instagram, Snapchat, or Twitter.

![](https://vaizle.com/assets/vcox-tw3/username-generator/why-use-icon3.png)

### On-the-Go Username Generator

With Vaizle’s unique username generator, you can instantly copy your new username and get started spreading your message on social media and beyond!

![](https://vaizle.com/assets/vcox-tw3/username-generator/why-use-icon4.png)

### No Registration or Sign Up Required

This username creator doesn’t require any logins! No account or registration needed to click “Generate” and view a list of randomized username ideas.

## Creative Username Ideas by Category & Niche

Get inspired by these username examples tailored to different industries and niches. Whether you're building a personal brand or a business profile, find the perfect style for your platform.

### Gaming Usernames

ShadowStriker, PixelWarrior, NovaGaming, EpicRaider, CyberNinja, GameMaster, LevelUpLegend

### Fashion & Lifestyle

ChicThreads, StyleMaven, TrendyVibes, GlamourGoals, VogueVibes, FashionFusion, ChicAndSleek

### Fitness & Wellness

FitJourney, ZenBalance, ActivePulse, HealthyHabits, StrongVibes, WellnessWarrior, FitFusion

### Food & Cooking

TastyBites, FlavorFusion, ChefVibes, FoodieFinds, CulinaryCanvas, SavorySoul, RecipeRealm

### Business & Professional

BrandBoost, MarketPro, GrowthHub, BizSavvy, SuccessSphere, CorporateEdge, ProNetwork

### Creative & Art

ArtisticSoul, DesignDreams, CreativeCanvas, VisualVibes, ArtFlow, ImagineStudio, SketchSphere

## How to Use This Tool as anInstagram & Random Username Generator

Maximize the power of our username generator by leveraging Instagram-specific features and random generation modes. Here's how to get the most out of this tool for creating IG handles and discovering unexpected username combinations.

### For Instagram & IG Handles

Instagram usernames have a 30-character limit and can only contain letters, numbers, periods, and underscores. Enter keywords that match your niche (e.g., "fitness", "fashion", "gaming"), select a relevant category, and check if your chosen IG handle is available before claiming it across platforms.


### Using Random Generation Mode

Select the "Random" option from the category dropdown to unlock completely unexpected username combinations. Our AI mixes trending keywords, aesthetic words, and creative modifiers to generate unique handles you might not think of on your own. Don't love the first batch? Hit Reset to generate fresh random usernames until you find the perfect fit.


### Cross-Platform Username Strategy

Once you find a username you love, claim it across all major platforms (Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, Twitter) to maintain brand consistency. Remember that each platform has different character limits and restrictions—our generator considers these nuances to deliver names that work everywhere.

FAQ (frequently asked questions)

## How to create a unique username?

### To create a unique username, consider the primary goal of your social media profile and the category it falls into. Also, think about the tone you want the username to convey, whether it’s professional, casual, or creative. Include a short description or relevant keyword that reflects your brand or interests. Finally, use the username generator AI tool to get a list of required usernames.

## How do I make my username catchy?

### If you’re wondering how to generate a username that’s catchy, go for something that will be concise and easy to remember for the audience. Also, incorporate keywords that will capture your brand essence perfectly.

## What is a unique username generator?

### A unique username generator is a tool that can help create different aesthetic usernames based on the input criteria. Such tools can be helpful if you’re struggling to come up with a creative or original username on your own.

## What is a good username example?

### A good username will always be easy to remember & spell, short, and reflective of your brand or personality. For example, if you’re a fitness brand owner, a username like ‘FitGuru’ or ‘FitnessCoach’ can be a great example.

## Can a username be your own name?

### Yes, a username can absolutely be your own name! However, it's possible that someone else with the same name may have already taken it. In such cases, you can use Vaizle’s cool username generator to create a unique username that fits your needs perfectly.

## Is there a username generator with name input?

### Yes! This AI username generator lets you input your name, nickname, or any word you like. Just type it into the box, and we’ll build username ideas around it — blending it with modifiers, stylistic twists, or creative suffixes to keep things unique and catchy.

## How do I use this as an IG username generator?

### To use our tool as an IG username generator, simply select 'Instagram' from the social media platforms dropdown, choose your category (like Fashion, Business, or Lifestyle), pick a tone, and add a short description. Our AI will instantly generate creative IG username ideas tailored for Instagram.

## What makes this a good Instagram username generator?

### Our Instagram username generator uses AI to create on-brand, memorable IG handles that match your niche and style. Unlike random generators, it considers your category, tone, and description to produce usernames that actually fit your Instagram profile and appeal to your target audience.

## Can I generate random usernames?

### Yes! Our random username generator creates unexpected, creative username ideas. Just select 'Random' from the category dropdown, and our tool will generate unique combinations of words, prefixes, and suffixes—perfect when you want fresh inspiration without specific constraints.

## How does the random username generator work?

### The random username generator uses AI to combine trending keywords, aesthetic modifiers, and creative elements to produce unique usernames. It's designed to give you unexpected inspiration—mixing words and styles you might not think of on your own.
